observation.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 << 'PYFIX'
with open('task/5/EmitMIR.cpp', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Fix 1: Extra parenthesis in UDiv line
content = content.replace('emitMC(llvm::RISCV::DIVU, {mcReg(dst), mcReg(lhs), mcReg(rhs)}); return);', 
                          'emitMC(llvm::RISCV::DIVU, {mcReg(dst), mcReg(lhs), mcReg(rhs)}); return;')

# Fix 2: Malformed function signature for emitICmpInst
content = content.replace('void emitICmpInst(const llvmInst(const llvm::ICmpInst& ci)',
                          'void emitICmpInst(const llvm::ICmpInst& ci)')

# Fix 3: Usage without llvm:: prefix
content = content.replace('dyn_cast<llvm::ConstantInt>', 'llvm::dyn_cast<llvm::ConstantInt>')

# Fix 4: Malformed AShr case
old_ashr = '''        if ( ci = dyn_castConstantInt>(bo.getOperand(1)))
          emitVSrai(dst, lhs, ci->getZExtValue());
        else
          emitVSra(dst, lhs, rhs);
        return;'''
new_ashr = '''        if (auto* ci = llvm::dyn_cast<llvm::ConstantInt>(bo.getOperand(1)))
          emitVSrai(dst, lhs, ci->getZExtValue());
        else
          emitVSra(dst, lhs, rhs);
        return;'''
content = content.replace(old_ashr, new_ashr)

# Fix 5: ret; -> return;
content = content.replace('        ret;\n      case', '        return;\n      case')

# Fix 6: Remove extra line in emitICmpInst function that has return followed by case
# The "ret;" for ICMP_SLE case
content = content.replace('        emitVXori(dst, tmp, 1);\n        ret;\n      case llvm::CmpInst::ICMP_SGT:',
                          '        emitVXori(dst, tmp, 1);\n        return;\n      case llvm::CmpInst::ICMP_SGT:')

with open('task/5/EmitMIR.cpp', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print('Fixes applied')
PYFIX
